system_summary: Claude Code MVP currently provides a terminal-first harness with explicit policy, verification, replay, and release acceptance layers.
provider_risks: Live provider acceptance still depends on valid local credentials or configured API tokens.
Delegated CLI providers may vary by installed binary version and local login state.
Long unattended acceptance tasks are best suited for delegated providers rather than single-shot HTTP transports.
evidence: Live provider checks require explicit opt-in environment variables.
